data.name: Heatwave: Sam's Stay
data.detailed_description:
The last thing Sam expected during his final summer before college was to end up staying at Michael’s house, his mom’s ex-husband. A man he hadn’t seen in over ten years and didn’t have the fondest memories of. What was meant to be a short stay quickly becomes something far more complicated, when old resentment meets unexpected curiosity.

As Sam meets new people and struggles with unfamiliar thoughts, one thing becomes clear: this trip isn’t just about getting by, it’s about discovering what he really desires.

KEY FEATURES

MEET HOT GUYS

Meet a cast of hot men who gradually awaken Sam’s imagination and desires, each with their own charm and personality. Enjoy playful banter, naughty fantasies and intense moments of intimacy.

MAKE CHOICES

Make choices that shape Sam’s experiences, conversations, and the moments you see along the way. Your decisions influence how his story unfolds, revealing different sides of the people he meets.

1500+ CG RENDERS

Enjoy a cinematic visual novel experience told through more than 2000 detailed CG images and videos, carefully bringing to life every expression, touch and steamy moment.

CHAT WITH GUYS ON FINDR

Chat with men on Findr and see where the conversation takes you. Matching each other's vibe? Some guys might be willing to share some pictures and videos.

DISCOVER HIDDEN STORIES

Explore the world and find stories hidden throughout the scenes. Collect each one to uncover more of what is going on in this town.

data.short_description: Step into Sam’s shoes and guide him through a summer of self-discovery, complicated relationships, and unexpected desires that will change everything.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 簡體中文, 泰文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.10+
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any card that supports OpenGL2 or later
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04+
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間
